title: LE2123_11.C.61_1610_202206141855
description:
New version: LE2123_11.C.61_1610_202206141855 System

[Improved] system stability

[Optimized] the fluency of system

[Fixed] the issue that clearing the background worked abnormally

[Updated] Android security patch to 2022.05

Camera

[Fixed] the occasional issue that camera crashed abnormally

[Fixed] the issue that photos did not display the right location information

Network

[Fixed] the issue that the mobile data network was unstable in some scenarios

Communication

[Fixed] the occasional issue for call dialing

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
